name: Trigger ID Search
description: find stuff by id but better !

list-and.name: List And
list-and.description: when providing multiple ids, treat it as all ids need to match instead of any (only rly useful in find group mode)

search-mode.name: Search Mode
search-mode.description: u can read a bit more abt these if u look at https://github.com/Nwo5-trg/Nwo5-Silly-API/blob/main/include/editor/trigger.hpp

include-current-selection.name: Include Current Selection
include-current-selection.description: whether to *not* deselect current selection before searching

use-selection-as-filter.name: Use Selection As Filter
use-selection-as-filter.description: only search for objects in selection if this is enabled (if no objs are selected then search all objs)

zoom-limit.name: Camera Zoom Limit
zoom-limit.description: how far the camera can zoom out if move to selection is enabled
